ddls:
CREATE TABLE "social_networks" (
  "network_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social network */,
  "network_name" TEXT /* Name of the social network (e.g., Twitter, Facebook, Instagram) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the social network */,
  "api_key" TEXT /* API key for the social network */,
  "api_secret" TEXT /* API secret for the social network */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the social network was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the social network was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("network_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* Profile picture of the user */,
  "bio" TEXT /* Biography of the user */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "network_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the social network where the post was made */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the post */,
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sentiment associated with the post */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text content of the post */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the image associated with the post */,
  "video_url" TEXT /* URL of the video associated with the post */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the post was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the post was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_sentiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("sentiment_id") REFERENCES sentiments ("sentiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_posts_network_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_id") REFERENCES social_networks ("network_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiments" (
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment */,
  "sentiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the sentiment (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sentiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the sentiment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the sentiment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post the tag is associated with */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the tag was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the tag was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_tags_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_likes" (
  "like_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each like */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post the like is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who liked the post */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the like was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the like was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("like_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_likes_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_likes_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "post_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post the comment is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text content of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_comments_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_post_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comment_likes" (
  "like_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each like */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment the like is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who liked the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the like was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the like was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("like_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comment_likes_comment_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_id") REFERENCES post_comments ("comment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comment_replies" (
  "reply_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reply */,
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the comment the reply is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the reply */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text content of the reply */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the reply was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the reply was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reply_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reply_likes" (
  "like_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each like */,
  "reply_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reply the like is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who liked the reply */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the like was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the like was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("like_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reply_likes_reply_id FOREIGN KEY ("reply_id") REFERENCES comment_replies ("reply_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users_followers" (
  "follower_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each follower */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the follower is associated with */,
  "follower_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is following */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the follower was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the follower was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("follower_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_followers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_followers_follower_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("follower_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_friendships" (
  "friendship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each friendship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the friendship is associated with */,
  "friend_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is friends with */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the friendship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the friendship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("friendship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_friendships_friend_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("friend_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_friendships_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "friendship_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each friendship request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the friendship request */,
  "requested_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the friendship request */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the friendship request (e.g., pending, accepted, declined) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the friendship request was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the friendship request was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_friendship_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_friendship_requests_requested_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("requested_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the group is associated with */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the group was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the group was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_groups_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "group_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each member */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group the member is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is a member of the group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the member was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the member was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_group_members_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES user_groups ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_group_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "group_posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group the post is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the post */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text content of the post */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the post was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the post was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_group_posts_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES user_groups ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_group_posts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "group_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post the comment is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "text" TEXT /* Text content of the comment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the comment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_group_comments_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES group_posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiment_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment analysis */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post the sentiment analysis is associated with */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score of the post (e.g., 0.5, 1.0) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the sentiment analysis was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the sentiment analysis was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentiment_analysis_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "entity_recognition" (
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entity */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* ID of the post the entity is associated with */,
  "entity_name" TEXT /* Name of the entity */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of the entity (e.g., person, organization, location) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the entity was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the entity was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_entity_recognition_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the role is associated with */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the notification is associated with */,
  "notification_text" TEXT /* Text content of the notification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the notification was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the notification was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_notifications" (
  "user_notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the notification is associated with */,
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* ID of the notification */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Read status of the notification (e.g., true, false) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user notification was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user notification was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_notifications_notification_id FOREIGN KEY ("notification_id") REFERENCES notifications ("notification_id")
)
